normalized_output.edit_description: Update parse.go to use 'exit(1)' for failure and 'exit(0)' for success, ensuring consistent exit codes per Go standard.
validation_commands: grep -q 'exit(0)' cmd/commands/parse.go && echo 'PASS: exit(0) used for success'
grep -q 'exit(1)' cmd/commands/parse.go && echo 'PASS: exit(1) used for failure'
grep -q 'exit(0)' cmd/commands/parse.go && echo 'PASS: exit(0) used for success'
normalized_output.expected_outcome: Parse function now returns exit(0) on success and exit(1) on failure, adhering to Go's standard exit codes.
